title: Compliance: rust lichen-core/l2_payload.rs dispatch byte
description: Policy: 02-physical-link.md §4.1. File: rust/lichen-core/src/l2_payload.rs. Status: COMPLIANT. Lines 15-21 use pattern matching on L2_DISPATCH_SCHC (0x14) and L2_DISPATCH_ROUTING (0x15) dispatch bytes before payload classification.
